title: JobStartRequest
description: Request body for starting a job. You can identify the task by taskId or taskName, and must specify the task type.

@type.description: The resource type identifier. Must be set to "job".

taskId.description: The ID of the task to run. Either taskId or taskName must be provided.

taskName.description: The name of the task to run. Either taskId or taskName must be provided.

taskType.description: The type of the task to run. Supported values include MTT (mapping task), WORKFLOW (taskflow), DSS (synchronization task), DRS (data replication task), and PCS (PowerCenter task).

callbackUrl.description: An optional URL that receives a callback when the job completes.

runtime.description: Optional runtime configuration for the job execution.

runtimeEnvironmentId.description: Override the runtime environment for this execution.
